content.verdict: The Waldorf Astoria Maldives Ithaafushi is the Hilton brand's most spectacular property — a tri-island resort in South Malé Atoll with some of the largest overwater villas in the region and a level of service consistent with the brand's legendary 'True Waldorf Service' philosophy. Its 123 villas across three natural islands, multiple award-winning restaurants, and the availability of an entire private island booking make it one of the Maldives' most dramatic luxury options. For honeymooners who want Waldorf's iconic grand hotel experience translated to a barefoot island setting, Ithaafushi is extraordinary.
content.best_room: The Grand Overwater Villa is the signature honeymoon category — at over 680 square metres, it is among the largest overwater villas in South Malé Atoll, with a private pool, outdoor Jacuzzi, and a master suite positioned entirely above the lagoon. For total privacy, the entire Private Island can be booked exclusively — its own beach, pool, and service team with no other guests.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Tri-Island Welcome
itinerary_7_nights.description: The resort is just 35 minutes by speedboat from Malé — close enough for convenient arrival, remote enough to feel completely removed. Your personal butler meets you at the private jetty and escorts you across the tri-island compound to your villa. The scale of the property impresses immediately: three natural islands, connected by jetties and bridges, each with its own character and amenities. Settle in and watch the sun set from your private lagoon deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Overwater Serenity
itinerary_7_nights.description: Wake to the sound of the Indian Ocean beneath your villa floor. Order a villa breakfast — the service is impeccable, delivered precisely as requested. Spend the morning exploring the house reef by snorkel, then devote the afternoon to your private pool and outdoor Jacuzzi. In the evening, dine at Terra, the resort's open-air restaurant serving contemporary Italian cuisine above the lagoon.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa & Wellness
itinerary_7_nights.description: Waldorf Astoria's spa — spanning over 2,000 square metres across two levels — is one of the largest in the Maldives. Book the Signature Maldivian Journey for two: a three-hour ritual of couples' massage, botanical body wrap, and hydrotherapy pool. The treatment rooms are set above the water, with the sound of the lagoon as your backdrop throughout.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Island Discovery
itinerary_7_nights.description: Even if you haven't booked the Private Island exclusively, day passes are available for guests wishing to experience the most secluded third island — with its own beach, pool, and dedicated kitchen. Arrange a private lunch here through your butler. On return, visit the Peacock Alley bar — the iconic Waldorf Astoria bar concept translated to a lagoon setting.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Diving & Marine Life
itinerary_7_nights.description: South Malé Atoll offers outstanding diving — the Guraidhoo Channel is famous for grey reef shark aggregations and strong drift diving. The resort's PADI dive centre is well-equipped for everything from first-timers to experienced divers. Non-divers can try the resort's underwater restaurant, Yasmina, for a unique dining experience beneath the lagoon surface.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Sunset Cocktails & Fine Dining
itinerary_7_nights.description: Today is entirely unhurried. Late breakfast on your villa deck, a long afternoon in the pool, and a pre-dinner aperitivo at the sunset bar — the west-facing position delivers spectacular sky colour every evening. Book dinner at the resort's tasting menu restaurant, where the chef presents an eight-course procession of global flavours with a dedicated wine pairing.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell Morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: The speedboat to Malé means no early seaplane stress — depart when you're ready. Take a final swim from your villa jetty, let your butler arrange the packing, and carry the extraordinary scale and beauty of this tri-island resort with you. The Waldorf Astoria Ithaafushi reminds you that some brands really do deserve their reputation.

caveats: With 123 villas across three islands, this is a large resort — couples seeking an intimate boutique feel may prefer a smaller property.
The food and beverage costs are significant, even by Maldives standards — budget carefully or opt for a meal plan.
Yasmina, the underwater restaurant, books up weeks in advance and requires early reservation.

faqs.question: Is Waldorf Astoria Ithaafushi good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — the combination of South Malé Atoll proximity (just 35 minutes from the airport), the enormous Grand Overwater Villas, multiple exceptional restaurants, and Waldorf's True Waldorf Service butler programme creates a honeymoon experience of genuine grandeur. The private island option is one of the most exclusive offerings in the Maldives.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit?
faqs.answer: November through April is the northeast monsoon dry season — calm seas, blue skies, and ideal diving visibility. Given its proximity to Malé, the resort can be comfortably reached year-round, and off-season rates during May to October can be significantly lower.

faqs.question: What should we book in advance?
faqs.answer: Reserve the Yasmina underwater restaurant experience as early as possible — it is the most in-demand dining experience in the Maldives. Spa treatments and private island day passes should also be booked before arrival.

faqs.question: Is it adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, Waldorf Astoria Ithaafushi welcomes children and offers dedicated children's facilities. The tri-island layout means different guest demographics naturally occupy different areas, keeping the overwater villa zones romantic and tranquil.

faqs.question: What's the best room for a honeymoon?
faqs.answer: The Grand Overwater Villa — at 680+ sqm — is the most impressive honeymoon suite, combining sheer scale with a private pool and Jacuzzi directly above the lagoon. For an absolute splurge, booking the Private Island exclusively is available for parties wanting total seclusion.

faqs.question: How do we get there?
faqs.answer: Waldorf Astoria Ithaafushi is just 35 minutes by speedboat from Malé International Airport — no seaplane required. This proximity is a genuine convenience and makes even late-night arrivals feasible.
